title: Pandemic Outbreak
description: A new virus spreads rapidly across the nation.

turns.speaker: economy
turns.text: Lockdowns save lives and prevent hospital collapse. Early lockdowns reduced transmission dramatically.

turns.speaker: rights
turns.text: And they crushed small businesses and personal freedom. Targeted restrictions are more balanced.

turns.speaker: economy
turns.text: Targeted measures are too slow when exponential spread is involved.

turns.speaker: rights
turns.text: Blanket lockdowns punish healthy people and destroy livelihoods.

turns.speaker: economy
turns.text: Lives lost destroy livelihoods too. Economic recovery is impossible without public health.
